channel.title: Geospatial on Systology
channel.description: Recent content in Geospatial on Systology

item.title: Proximity Service for Maps
item.description: An optimized system design for discovering nearby points of interest with ultra-low latency; deeply focusing on efficient spatial indexing via Geohashing, Quadtrees, and read-heavy caching tiers.

item.title: Global CDN Media Serving
item.description: A robust edge-optimized CDN-backed media delivery architecture; designed explicitly for seamless, highly available global media serving with completely decoupled background upload processing.
